task_description: Refactor the agent-guard system to use a polyglot/multi-language approach similar to BankrBot's architecture. Create Python scripts for input scanning and knowledge auditing, Shell scripts for skill scanning and output validation, declarative YAML files for policies, and a TypeScript bridge (runner.ts) that connects scripts to the Next.js app with fallback to existing TS implementation.

verification.summary: npm run build passes. All script self-tests pass (validate-output.sh: 17 tests). Review v2 fixes applied: (1) runGuardOutput now forwards blockedOutputPatterns and systemPromptHash as JSON payload via stdin to validate-output.sh, matching runGuardInput pattern. (2) validate-output.sh parses JSON input with 'output' key for structured mode, plain text for backward compat. (3) Python3 block checks custom blocked patterns and system prompt hash. (4) Text piped to python3 via stdin instead of argv to avoid ARG_MAX on large inputs. Tested with 200K char input successfully.
